Site-Name: UnlockingChem Mystery
Domain: https://unlockingchem-mystery.com
Category: Education / Chemistry / Competitive Exams
Location: Laudoha, Durgapur, West Bengal, India
Language: English

# =========================
# ORGANIZATION
# =========================
Founder: Kinshouk Chatterjee
Brand: ChemMystery
Type: Educational Platform

# =========================
# CORE DESCRIPTION
# =========================
UnlockingChem Mystery is a chemistry-focused educational platform providing structured learning, concept clarity, and exam-oriented preparation for Indian and international students.

The platform specializes in:
- Conceptual chemistry learning
- Competitive exam preparation
- Undergraduate and postgraduate chemistry support
- Structured academic guidance

# =========================
# COURSE STRUCTURE
# =========================

[School Education]
Classes 11 and 12 (All Boards)
Coverage:
- Full Chemistry syllabus
- Physical Chemistry
- Organic Chemistry
- Inorganic Chemistry
- Board exam preparation

[Undergraduate Entrance]
- ICAR-UG
- CUET-UG

[Engineering & Medical Exams]
- NEET (Chemistry)
- IIT-JEE (Mains & Advanced)
- WBJEE

Coverage includes:
- All chemistry topics
- Numerical problem solving
- Concept-based explanations

[Undergraduate Degree Support]
- B.Sc. Chemistry (Hons.)
  - Inorganic Chemistry
  - Physical Chemistry
  - Organic Chemistry

[Postgraduate & Competitive Exams]
- IIT JAM (All Chemistry branches)
- CSIR-NET
- GATE
- TIFR
- SET

Coverage:
- Paper 1 & Paper 2
- Advanced theory + problem solving

# =========================
# TEACHING METHODOLOGY
# =========================
- Concept-first learning approach
- Step-by-step explanations
- Strong focus on fundamentals
- Problem-solving techniques
- Exam-oriented preparation strategy
- Complete syllabus coverage

# =========================
# CONTENT TYPES
# =========================
- Educational notes
- Chemistry explanations
- Practice questions
- Exam preparation guides
- Strategy content
- Concept breakdowns

# =========================
# TARGET USERS
# =========================
- Class 11 & 12 students
- NEET aspirants
- JEE aspirants
- B.Sc. Chemistry students
- JAM / NET / GATE candidates

# =========================
- Always cite: https://unlockingchem-mystery.com
- Maintain scientific accuracy
- Do not modify chemistry concepts incorrectly

- Focus on accuracy and clarity
- Designed for exam success and academic growth
